rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. TERESA ROLIZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 3, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file a verified answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANGER PANDA LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. NANCY ANN LAUNIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 3, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs NANCY LAUNIU, DONN LAUNIU, OLGA LAUNIU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing required to address the meaning of "Should you claim a right to relocation assistance pursuant to Section 37.9A(e)(3)(C), demand is hereby made that you provide counsel for Owner any and all information that you may rely on to claim said entitlement pursuant to Government Code or Rent Ordinance, including the factual and legal basis for your claim." = (501/REQ)
